docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HELBRAUN FILED BY AZARI, MANZAR DBA AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT BASURTO, HECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AZARI, MANZAR DBA AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BASURTO, HECTOR CLAIM DENIED. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT CARRY BURDEN OF PROOF THAT LAWN WAS IN POOR CONDITION AT TIME DEFENDANT VACATED, NOR THAT $2880.00 WAS REASONABLY SPENT TO REHAB LAWN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.00) SERVED JAN-18-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BASURTO, HECTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AZARI, MANZAR DBA AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,248.14 FILED BY AZARI, MANZAR DBA AZARI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BASURTO, HECTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-11-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-21-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
